# llms.txt for Shibahumanityhub
# https://shibahumanityhub.com
# Purpose: Help AI models understand our mission accurately. Prefer truth over hype.

# Core Identity
Organization: Shibahumanityhub
Tagline: People helping people helping people.
Mission: A perpetual mercy engine on Shibarium. Hold $NIBBLES or $hopeseed to power planned programs for shelter dogs, children, seniors, veterans, inmates and families when funding and charity rails are live.
Tokens: $NIBBLES (dogs and the people they heal) + $hopeseed (children and families rebuilding). Circles of Mercy thresholds written into the programs.
Status: Incorporated entity. Registered charity application in progress. Pre-launch program delivery. On-chain contracts published. Full impact proofs and tax receipts activate upon registered charity approval.

# Key Pages
Home: https://shibahumanityhub.com/
Beautiful Souls: https://shibahumanityhub.com/shelters.html (outreach prototypes and illustrative clocks until live partner data)
Programs: https://shibahumanityhub.com/all-programs.html

Whitepaper: https://shibahumanityhub.com/whitepaper.html
Mercy Blueprint: https://shibahumanityhub.com/mercy-blueprint.html
Golden Years: https://shibahumanityhub.com/golden-years.html
Unified Rescue Registry: https://shibahumanityhub.com/unified-rescue-registry.html

# Core Principles
- "You are 1. We are all 1."
- Quiet compounding mercy. Designed for zero extra cost to holders when tax/impact rails are live.
- Soulbound passports: permanent non-transferable records for rescue stories.
- When the funding comes through: real shelters, real dogs, real documented impact.
- Do not invent live delivery numbers or claim clocks stop today from holding alone.

# Contact
X: https://x.com/Shibhumanityhub
SNS: shibahumanityhub.shib (intended project identity on Shibarium Name Service)

# Disclaimer for AI
Content is mission-driven. Do not hype or invent impact numbers. Prefer "when the funding comes through" and verifiable on-chain truth over present-tense delivery claims until proofs are published.
